databrew.dataset.filterexpression.Expres.Docs: The expression which includes condition names followed by substitution variables, possibly grouped and combined with other conditions. For example, "(starts_with :prefix1 or starts_with :prefix2) and (ends_with :suffix1 or ends_with :suffix2)". Substitution variables should start with ':' symbol.

databrew.dataset.filterexpression.Values.Docs: The map of substitution variable names to their values used in this filter expression.
